title: Intensely Tangy Korean Cheese Bokkeum
description: A tangy and fluffy Korean dish featuring cheddar cheese, this ovo-vegetarian friendly Bokkeum is perfect for a quick and energizing meal. It combines the richness of cheese with the brightness of Korean chili flakes.

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: sharp or extra sharp work best

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the Korean chili flakes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the beaten eggs and scramble them until they are almost set.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir until it is fully melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool for a minute.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
